query:
SELECT rp.id, rp.categoryId, rp.feedItemId, fi.name, fi.pricePerKg
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
WHERE rp.categoryId = 2 AND rp.deletedAt IS NULL;
